_meta.note: Canonical progress-as-code (fix-16). Auto-merged by docs/index.html over HTTP. 2026-07-09 full-audit + remediation (research/12): FIXED and re-closed glue-08 (accepted apt releaseinfo change -> ansible-pull converges ok=30 failed=0, pings green) and sbom-03 (cleared etckeeper ref-lock + stale index.lock -> commits clean, sweep 63/63). RETIRED sbom-01/02/04 (user decision): SBOM/Dependency-Track judged overkill for a home net + syft was OOM'ing the 8GB mini; sbom-nightly timers disabled on mini+rig and the `sbom` ansible role removed so convergence won't redeploy it (sbom-01/04 left in done as completed setup work, feature retired). fix-19 default-address-pools restored in daemon.json + docker role (converge had been stripping them). 137->139; sbom-02 not counted (retired). 2026-07-09 docs-debt audit: closed game-03 (heavy game servers on the rig) — AMP (MinecraftCross Java+Bedrock) + Palworld run 24/7 on the rig with public playit paths, protocol-ping verified; was reality-done/tracker-open. Audit also re-verified done-claims across dns/nas/ha/verify tracks against the live fleet: no other reality-vs-tracker mismatch found; reopen-suggestions empty.

retired.sbom-01: 2026-07-09 (user decision): SBOM/Dependency-Track feature retired — overkill for a home network and syft was OOM'ing the 8GB mini nightly (Jul 04-08). Syft/Grype install left in place but the nightly pipeline is disabled. Left in done as completed setup work.
retired.sbom-02: 2026-07-09 (user decision): RETIRED — the nightly-SBOM->Dependency-Track objective is abandoned. sbom-nightly timers disabled on mini+rig; the `sbom` ansible role removed from site.yml so convergence won't redeploy it. Was failing on both hosts anyway (mini OOM, rig missing env file).
retired.sbom-04: 2026-07-09 (user decision): part of the retired SBOM feature (per-OS package manifest for syft). Left in done as completed work; no longer feeding an active pipeline.
